name: debugger-ext
description: AI-powered runtime error analysis for Python with structured AST inspection and Gemini explanations

debugger-ext.geminiApiKey.markdownDescription: Your **Google Gemini API key**. Get one at [aistudio.google.com](https://aistudio.google.com/). Leave blank to use rule-based fallback only.

debugger-ext.backendUrl.markdownDescription: URL of the Debug Analysis Service backend. Use the default for a locally spawned backend, or point to a remote deployment.

debugger-ext.autoStartBackend.description: Automatically start the Python backend when the extension activates.

debugger-ext.pythonPath.description: Python executable used to run the target script and spawn the backend. Use full path if Python is not on PATH.

debugger-ext.contextLines.description: Number of surrounding lines to include on each side of the error line.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
